description: An official summary or award letter issued by the Department of Veterans Affairs verifying a veteran's benefit type, disability rating, and monthly payment details.

veteran_ssn.instruction: Social Security Number of the veteran. Reformat as XXX-XX-XXXX.

veteran_state.instruction: State of the veteran. Two-letter code.

va_file_number.instruction: The unique VA file number or service identification number associated with the claim.

benefit_type.instruction: Type of VA benefit (disability compensation, pension, education, etc.).

effective_date.instruction: Date the current monthly payment amount or disability rating went into effect. YYYY-MM-DD format.

disability_rating.instruction: Combined disability rating percentage if applicable (e.g., 70%, 100%).

number_of_dependents.instruction: Number of dependents factored into benefit calculation.

letter_date.instruction: Date the VA letter was issued. YYYY-MM-DD format.

issuing_office.instruction: VA Regional Office or issuing entity.
